label: The Dustcellar
description: The Dustcellar serves as Catenary Lensworks’ sealed storage room for charged glass fallouts, abrasives, and finished blanks awaiting edge-seal. Faceted vitrified walls are laced with grounded gutters and conductive grilles that bleed electrostatic charge into the workshop’s cistern network, preventing dust bloom and grit drift. Racked bins of dark ceramic and mirror-glass coffers stand in strict gauge-marked bays, each aligned to the radiance trough’s measurement bands for rapid inventory verification. The air remains dry and metallic, and the floor’s fused-silicate tiles bear etched catenary indices used to keep stacks within the cable-arch load limits.
